title: SoFi Loan Originations by Type and Trends
text: SoFi Technologies has demonstrated significant growth in loan originations across all product categories. In Q1 2026, the company achieved record total loan originations of $12.2 billion, a 68% increase from the prior year. Personal loan originations reached $8.3 billion in Q1 2026, up 51% from Q1 2025. Student loan originations more than doubled to $2.6 billion, up 119% from the prior year. Home loan originations increased 137% to $1.2 billion. The company's loan platform business added $3.6 billion in new partner commitments in Q1 alone, with demand from partners exceeding contractual obligations. In Q4 2025, personal loan originations reached a record $7.5 billion, up 43% year-over-year, with $3.7 billion originated on behalf of third parties. SoFi's market share in personal loans has grown dramatically, reaching approximately 60% among select peer lenders in Q3 2024, up from around 20% in 2021. The company captured nearly 6% market share of the U.S. personal loans business as of 2023.
